def: To flip a point to the other side of a line, like a mirror image.
example: Reflect (3, 2) over the up-down line to get (-3, 2).

def: One of the two number lines on the grid that you can flip a point across.
example: Flip the point across the across axis to move it up or down.

def: Changing a number from positive to negative, or negative to positive.
A flipped copy of a point that sits the same distance on the other side of a line.
example: (2, -4) is the mirror image of (2, 4) over the across line.
